tasks.role_in_slide: 作为标题页视觉中心，快速建立研究对象
tasks.source_reference_text: 文献[1] National Center for Biotechnology Information, Aspirin，PubChem Compound Summary
tasks.document_position: PubChem 条目主页面，图号不适用
tasks.image_content_description: 阿司匹林二维结构、分子式、同义名
tasks.usage_suggestion: 据数据库重绘，不要直接截整页
tasks.automation_method: Use PubChem PUG-REST to fetch SMILES/SDF for CID 2244, redraw with RDKit as clean 2D structure; do not screenshot PubChem page.
tasks.notes_for_codex: If source cannot be accessed or figure cannot be located, create the missing placeholder and continue with remaining tasks.

tasks.recommended_image: 阿司匹林历史/应用概念小图
tasks.role_in_slide: 强调阿司匹林是经典药物、选题有代表性
tasks.document_position: 正文首页；具体插图需打开 PDF 后核实
tasks.image_content_description: 若文中无合适图片，建议只提取“1897”“125 years”等历史信息自绘时间标识
tasks.usage_suggestion: 自己绘制时间标签，不要依赖无来源网络配图
tasks.automation_method: Use literature facts only; create a clean time label or badge with '1897' and '125 years'. Do not use unrelated web images.
tasks.notes_for_codex: If source cannot be accessed or figure cannot be located, create the missing placeholder and continue with remaining tasks.

tasks.recommended_image: 水杨酸与阿司匹林结构对比图

tasks.image_content_description: 水杨酸与阿司匹林二维结构
tasks.usage_suggestion: 自己重绘，统一字体和键线风格
tasks.automation_method: Fetch aspirin CID 2244 and salicylic acid by name from PubChem; redraw both structures with uniform RDKit style, label acetyl group difference.
tasks.notes_for_codex: If source cannot be accessed or figure cannot be located, create the missing placeholder and continue with remaining tasks.

tasks.role_in_slide: 把后续所有方法统一到同一反应本质

tasks.image_content_description: 水杨酸与乙酸酐生成乙酰水杨酸
tasks.automation_method: Draw salicylic acid + acetic anhydride -> acetylsalicylic acid + acetic acid using RDKit structures and a reaction arrow; cite refs 2 and 4.

tasks.role_in_slide: 把“加料—加热—加水—冷却—抽滤—重结晶”讲清楚

tasks.image_content_description: 教学实验步骤或自动化装置流程

tasks.role_in_slide: 把“腐蚀、刺激性、水解、副产物、三废”一页讲清
